name: Haku
description:
Haku is [Chihiro](https://anilist.co/character/384/Chihiro-Ogino)'s first friend in the strange world. He studies with the sorceress [Yubaba](https://anilist.co/character/4716/Yubaba) and has magical powers. It's said that he lost his way home and his name in the world of spirits.

~!At the end of the movie, it is revealed that his real name is Nigihayami Kohaku Nushi (Spirit of the Kohaku River).!~
